title: How DoorDash is evolving its retail media arm as ad revenue grows
text: DoorDash and Wolt Ads crossed an annualized advertising revenue run rate of over $1 billion across 30+ countries where they operate, making DoorDash and Wolt Ads the fastest-growing retail media network in history. Ad revenue doubled year-over-year as DoorDash rolled out self-serve ad tools for merchants, representing approximately 8% of total revenue. The company expanded its advertising platform significantly with AI-powered tools allowing SMB restaurant merchants to create customized campaigns. Sponsored Products now appear across all categories in U.S. and international searches, enabling advertisers to reach high-intent consumers. Strategic acquisition of Symbiosys (valued at $175 million) brings offsite advertising opportunities and self-serve platforms for search, social, and display campaigns. Higher-margin streams like subscriptions, advertising, and marketplace services are expected to drive future profitability, reducing reliance on thin delivery margins.
